dep_code.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

combo.dep_code: 01=หุ้นหนี้/02=บริหาร/03=ติดตามหนี้/04=สินเชื่อ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.loan_contract ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.pricipal ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.balance ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_old ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_compomise ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.effactive_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS effactive_tdate ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.remark ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS operate_tdate ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.installment_old ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_id
,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put_old ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put_old = '01' then 'คงต้น' when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put_old = '02' then 'คงยอด' else null end as code_put_old_desc
,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put = '01' then 'คงต้น' when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put = '02' then 'คงยอด' else null end as code_put_desc
FROM sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename ,sc_mem_m_chang_request
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.cancel_status = 0 ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status not in '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status = '1' )
/*WHERE*/
ORDER BY sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no -- sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status, -- sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no,
